summary: Frontend testing of Sr-Renovation.fr quote form features: app compilation, form fields, unit selector, per-item remise, payment plans (4 options), quotes list sorting, live PDF preview, PDF download. All 10 test items passed successfully after the critical syntax bug fix (double ServicesSection declaration).

issues: Console warnings about HTML hydration: '<span> cannot be child of <select/option>'. These originate from the Emergent visual editor overlay (x-file-name attributes) and do NOT affect user-facing functionality. The native <select> element works perfectly.

critical_code_review_comments: The native HTML <select> element used for units in ServicesSection generates React hydration warnings in development due to Emergent editor span injections. No fix needed as it works correctly in production.
ServicesSection is correctly defined OUTSIDE QuoteForm component (line 21) - the critical syntax fix from previous iteration is confirmed working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features tested and passing: (1) App compiles without error, (2) Quote form /quotes/new loads with all sections (Client, Lieu des travaux, Diagnostic visuel, Modalités de paiement, Services OPTION 1), (3) Unit select has 7 options: unité, m², ML, m, h, forfait, kg, (4) Remise % per service line works with correct total calculation (qty * price * (1 - remise/100)), (5) 4 payment plan radio buttons all present and functional, (6) Quotes list /quotes sorts alphabetically by client_name, (7) Live PDF preview updates reactively with all form changes, (8) PDF preview ServicesTable shows 'Unité' column header and unit value per row, (9) Payment plan changes reflected in PDF preview (2x/3x/4x versements shown), (10) PDF download button generates and downloads DEVIS_*.pdf file. The app is feature-complete for these requirements.

test_results.test_1_app_loads: PASS - No compilation errors, app renders dashboard correctly
test_results.test_2_form_loads: PASS - Client, Diagnostic visuel, Modalités de paiement, Services sections all visible
test_results.test_3_units_select: PASS - All 7 units present: unité, m², ML, m, h, forfait, kg
test_results.test_4_remise_percent: PASS - Remise % input in each service row, total calculated correctly (10*25*(1-10%)=225€)
test_results.test_6_quotes_sorted: PASS - Quotes list alphabetically sorted by client_name
test_results.test_7_live_preview: PASS - Client info, work location, service description, total all update in real-time in preview
test_results.test_8_unit_in_pdf: PASS - 'm²' visible in service table of PDF preview, 'Unité' column header present
test_results.test_9_payment_in_pdf: PASS - 2fois shows '1er/2ème versement (50%)', 3fois shows '33%', 4fois shows '25%×4' in preview
